posts.title: Don't Panic
posts.excerpt: The first entry. Why a galaxy, why a guide, and where this journey is headed.
posts.body:
Welcome to **The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy** — a travel journal that runs alongside everything I make.

This is where I'll write about the inspirations behind each world, the dead ends and breakthroughs, and the strange connections between coding, fashion, painting, film and photography.

The galaxy you just flew through is the first project in its own right. More to come — so long, and thanks for reading.

*— Helix*
